extracted.full_content:
Jitender Bhatia

CEO & Founder | Salesforce Architect at Forcecraver | Expert in Salesforce, DataCloud, Agentforce, SAP, Oracle, Full Stack Development, Data Science & Engineering | Transforming CRM & Tech Solutions

🚀 We’re Hiring: Data / GenAI Engineers (#Forcecraver)

We are looking for experienced Data / Generative AI Engineers to join our Professional Services team on a contract basis and deliver production-grade AI solutions.

📍 Location: Remote (India Only)
🕒 Shift: 8 AM – 4 PM EST

🔹 What You’ll Work On:
	•	Conversational AI assistants
	•	RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems
	•	Document processing automation
	•	AI-powered data analytics platforms

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
	•	Build GenAI solutions using Amazon Bedrock & LLMs (Claude, OpenAI, Cohere)
	•	Develop RAG pipelines with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, OpenSearch)
	•	Design serverless architectures using AWS Lambda, API Gateway
	•	Create APIs (FastAPI/Flask) for real-time AI systems
	•	Implement prompt engineering, embeddings, and AI agents
	•	Work directly with clients in agile delivery environments

🔹 Must-Have Skills:
	•	Strong Python (3.9+) expertise
	•	Hands-on with Amazon Bedrock & LLM integrations
	•	Experience with LangChain / LlamaIndex / AI agents
	•	Solid AWS serverless architecture experience
	•	Vector DB & RAG implementation experience
	•	REST API development

🔹 Experience Required:
	•	5+ years in software engineering
	•	2+ years in AWS (production deployments)
	•	1+ year in Generative AI / LLMs / RAG systems

💡 India-based candidates only

📩 Please reach out to me at +919899634637 or jbhatia@forcecraver.com to discuss further.
🔔 Follow @Jitender Bhatia @Forcecraver Technologies for more job updates.
